title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at RBL Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at RBL Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with RBL Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About RBL Bank:
RBL Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank!
